overview: Prime Men's Health is a telehealth clinic specializing in testosterone replacement therapy, erectile dysfunction treatment, and weight loss solutions. Care is delivered through virtual consultations, flexible lab testing options, and direct-to-door medication delivery.
highlights: Telehealth consultations with virtual provider visits
Home lab kits or access to partner labs (Quest, LabCorp)
Medications shipped directly to door within days
targetAudience: Men seeking online access to testosterone therapy, sexual health treatment, and weight loss solutions.
